seoTitle: Kelvin vs Kembla Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kelvin and Kembla Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kelvin vs Kembla Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kelvin and Kembla Heights.
heading: Kelvin vs Kembla Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kelvin, New South Wales and Kembla Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kelvin and Kembla Heights have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Kelvin or Kembla Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kelvin has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kembla Heights scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kelvin scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Kembla Heights scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kelvin or Kembla Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kelvin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
